km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: William I de Peche於1030年出生在英國。他和Mary至少有1個兒子。他去世於1070年在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William I de Peche于1030年出生在英国。他和Mary至少有1个儿子。他去世于1070年在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: William I de Peche was born in 1030, in England. He had at least 1 son with Mary. He died in 1070, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: William I de Peche est né en 1030, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mary. Il est décédé en 1070, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William I de Peche wurde 1030 in England geboren. Er hatte mit Mary mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1070 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: William I de Peche è nato il nel 1030 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mary. Morì nel 1070, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William I de Pecheは1030年にイギリスで生まれた。彼はMaryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1070年に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William I de Peche(은)는 1030년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 Mary(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1070년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William I de Peche nasceu em 1030, em Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mary. Ele faleceu em 1070, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William I de Peche родился в 1030 г. в местности Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mary. Он умер в 1070 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William I de Peche nació en 1030, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mary. Murió en 1070, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años.

th.1030–Female: ปี1030–ถึงแก่กรรม
